270.name: Wodyr The Wise
270.hail: Hail to thee my child. I am Wodyr The Wise. I have only one thing to say; the dark elves are going to take over, unless someone stops them. Go tell the emperor ! GO TELL GENERAL KRUMINS ! We are all going under if not !

271.name: Daluin The CastleFall Guards Captain
271.hail: Can't you see im busy? I have better things to do, like fighting off criminals to save your behind !

535.name: Smaug The Mighty Dragon
535.hail: Whahahaha ! You think you can challange me? Smaug The Mighty Dragon!? Stab my eyes out, tear my heart out ! Let me fry you ! I will protect my gold !
